titleStmt.title: SII 39.59: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 59. (A.R. No. 59 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. ••••••••••

summary.p: This inscription states that a certain Kaḷakarāya of Sundarachōḻapuram alias Dēsiyugandapaṭṭiṇam in Tenkōnāḍu, a sub-division of Olliyūr-kuṟṟam, set up, an image Pallakku-sokkar in the temple of Tirukkōlakkuḍi-Āṇḍa-Nayiṉār and arranged for a festival for which he received in return certain temple honours. Lines 17-29 seem to belong to a different inscription referring to the order of the nāṭṭavar of Ponnamarāpati-nāḍu sent to the same village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī caṟupati varuṣam puraṭṭāti mātam 10§ puṟamalai nāṭṭu tirukkoḻak
kuṭi Āṇṭa nayiṉār koyil śrī paṇṭāra kāriyattukka
ṭavarroti Ollaiyūr kūṟṟattu teṉkoṉāṭṭu cuntara coḻa
puramāṉa teciyukanta paṭṭaṇattu kaṇṇaṉūruṭaiyāṉ
pūvuvaṉār kiḷavar poṉṉāṇṭār tirukkaṭṭiyarāṉa kaḷa
kārāyarkku piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi Innayiṉār tiruk
koyilukku Ivar taṉmamāka pallakku cokkar Eḷuntaruḷa pa
ṇṇukaiyil peruntirunāḷ naṭanta Ivarkku Oru parivaṭṭamuṅ ka
ṭṭi tiṅkaḷ tīvaṅkaḻukku titta tiruniṟu tirumālaiyum peṟṟu peṟa
kaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku ttu piramarāyar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
paṭṭar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cuntarapāṇ
ṭiya piramānārayar Eḻuttu

ṟukka kaṭavarkaḷ Eṉṟum Oṉṟupaṭa naṭatti potakkaṭavarkaḷ
ḷeṉṉum Iccetikku tirukkoḷakkuṭi nāyaṉār ko
yilil tirumalaiyile kalveṭṭik kuṭuppateṉṟu piramāṇa
m vantappaṭiyāle nāṅkaḷum nāṭṭuṭaṉe kūṭṭi Eṅkaḷ
mariyāti kaṭamai Iṟuppatāka cantirātitta varai celvatā
ka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭu nāṭṭa
varom viraiyāccilaiyuḷḷiṭṭa Ūrāvaṟkum koṭṭiyūr
Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūravaṟkum Ippaṭikku poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭu nāṭṭa
varom viraiyāccilaiyuḷḷiṭṭa Ūrāvaṟkum koṭṭiyūr
Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrāvaṟkum Ippaṭikku poṉṉamā nāṭṭu nā
var coṟi nilaimaiyiḻa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāṇāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkup periyaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Aṟivuṭai muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
